headline: Bitcoin tumbles, crypto momentum fades as Trump extends Iran timeline
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma reports on the sharp sell-off in crypto-linked stocks on Thursday, including Coinbase (COIN), Robinhood (HOOD), and Circle Internet Group (CRCL), as fading momentum and shifting investor sentiment trigger a broader pullback.Cryptocurrency bitcoin (BTC-USD) falls back below $67,000 as investors digest President Trump's latest remarks on the Iran war.

headline: Trump Administration Sues Illinois, Arizona, Connecticut To Shield Kalshi, Polymarket From Gambling Laws
